summary: Verified user icon bug fix: marker created ONCE (guard clause at line 1270), vehicle-pointer CSS has transition:none, smoothedHeadingRef restored on creation. Navigation view loads correctly with stable user icon. Settings truck profile edit modal works (regression check passed).
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Guard clause 'if (userMarkerRef.current) return;' at line 1270 prevents marker recreation on GPS updates
VERIFIED: Comment 'Create user marker ONCE when map is ready' at line 1265
VERIFIED: smoothedHeadingRef.current restored on marker creation (lines 1289-1290) prevents initial 0-degree flash
VERIFIED: .vehicle-pointer CSS has 'transition: none' in index.css (line 41)
VERIFIED: .user-marker-container CSS has 'transition: none' in index.css (line 35)
VERIFIED: No window.prompt() calls in /app/components/ or /app/src/ (only in node_modules Firebase type definitions)
VERIFIED: Settings page EditModal component works correctly with data-testid attributes

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: User icon bug fix verified: 1) Marker creation useEffect has guard clause preventing recreation. 2) Position updates handled by interpolation loop via setLatLng(). 3) Vehicle-pointer CSS transition removed. 4) smoothedHeadingRef pre-applied on marker creation. Navigation view loads with stable gold arrow icon on satellite map. Settings truck profile edit modal regression check passed.

user_marker_guard_clause.details: Guard clause 'if (userMarkerRef.current) return;' at line 1270 prevents marker recreation

vehicle_pointer_no_transition.details: CSS computed style shows transition: 'none' - prevents desync with map rotation

smoothed_heading_restored.details: smoothedHeadingRef.current applied on marker creation (lines 1289-1290) prevents 0-degree flash

user_icon_visible.details: Gold arrow icon in black circle visible on navigation map near Council Bluffs, Iowa

navigation_view_loads.details: Navigation view loads without errors, Mapbox satellite tiles display correctly

no_window_prompt.details: No window.prompt() calls in app code (only in node_modules Firebase type definitions)

settings_edit_modal_regression.details: Truck profile edit modal opens, shows input field, save/cancel/close buttons work
